name: Roasted Potatoes with Garlic and Thyme
recipeIngredient: 2 pounds small potatoes (Red Bliss and Yukon Gold)
3 cloves garlic, peeled and finely minced
Salt and freshly ground black pepper to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Leave potato skins on, scrub with a brush to remove dirt or blemishes, and dry with paper towels or a cloth.
3. Cut potatoes in half or quarters as needed.
4. Pour olive oil into a roasting pan or large cast-iron skillet; heat in the oven for 10 minutes before adding potatoes.
5. Roast potatoes for 45 minutes until crisp, shaking the pan several times during cooking to ensure even browning.
6. Remove from oven and drain on paper towels or cloth to absorb excess oil.
7. Transfer to serving dish.
8. In a sauté pan, melt butter; add garlic and cook until light golden brown. Add herbs and stir quickly, then remove from heat.
9. Pour the garlic-herb butter over potatoes, season with salt and pepper, and serve.
Yield: 4 to 6 servings
